tasks.subject: fix-relay-history-sse-gaps [P2] Add done event tracing logs in session-broadcaster
tasks.description:
## Objective
Add server-side observability for `done` event delivery. Log when a `done` event is queued to the relay write queue and when it is actually written to the SSE stream, providing tracing data for debugging remaining delivery gaps.

## Implementation

In `apps/server/src/services/session/session-broadcaster.ts`, locate the `subscribeToRelay()` method (or wherever relay events are fanned into the SSE stream).

### 1. Log when `done` event is queued

Find the code path where relay events are enqueued for SSE delivery. Add a debug/trace log when the event type is `done`:

```typescript
if (event.type === 'done') {
  logger.debug('[SSE] done event queued for client %s session %s', clientId, sessionId);
}
```

### 2. Log when `done` event is written to the response

Find the code path where events are actually written to the SSE response (`res.write()`). Add a log when `done` is written:

```typescript
if (event.type === 'done') {
  logger.debug('[SSE] done event written to stream for client %s session %s', clientId, sessionId);
}
```

Use the existing logger instance in the file. If no logger exists, use `console.debug` (the server has a logger utility, but check what the file currently uses).

### 3. Log when SSE write fails for done event

If there's error handling around `res.write()`, add specific logging for `done` event write failures:

```typescript
if (event.type === 'done') {
  logger.warn('[SSE] done event write FAILED for client %s session %s: %s', clientId, sessionId, error.message);
}
```

## Acceptance Criteria
- When a `done` event enters the relay-to-SSE pipeline, a debug log is emitted with client and session IDs
- When a `done` event is successfully written to the SSE stream, a debug log is emitted
- When a `done` event write fails, a warning log is emitted
- Logs are at debug/warn level (not info) to avoid noise in normal operation
- No functional behavior changes
tasks.activeForm: Adding done event tracing logs in session-broadcaster

tasks.subject: fix-relay-history-sse-gaps [P3] Run full test suite and verify all fixes
tasks.description:
## Objective
Run the full test suite to verify all fixes are correct and no regressions were introduced.

## Steps

1. Run `pnpm test -- --run` from the repo root to execute all tests
2. Run `pnpm typecheck` to verify no type errors
3. Run `pnpm lint` to verify no lint violations
4. Fix any failures

## Verification Checklist
- [ ] All transcript-parser tests pass (including new relay context and Skill suppression tests)
- [ ] All session-broadcaster tests pass
- [ ] All use-chat-session tests pass (including staleness detector tests)
- [ ] No TypeScript errors in any package
- [ ] No ESLint errors
- [ ] `SDK_TOOL_NAMES` imports resolve correctly across packages

## Acceptance Criteria
- `pnpm test -- --run` exits with code 0
- `pnpm typecheck` exits with code 0
- `pnpm lint` exits with code 0 (warnings are acceptable)
tasks.activeForm: Running full test suite and verifying all fixes
